name: HESEM QMS Module Builder Ultra Round 11 - Glass Boardroom Pro
features: Glass Boardroom Pro shell that keeps the round 7 aura but raises contrast and lowers glare
Mode presets: Executive Aura Pro, Crystal Contrast, Audit Ledger Glass, Night Command Pro, Operator Clarity
Navigator board with tab jump actions and density awareness
Signal matrix for data, action, governance, and narrative balance
Composition board for shell, chrome, noise, surface, and edge discipline
Focus canvas toggle to hide side and rail panels while preserving the toolbar
Compact chrome toggle for tighter professional spacing
Auto polish to harden typography, contrast, release discipline, and glass recipe
11 new block templates for navigator, signal, focus, audit, decision, and visual contract flows
bugFixes: Removes round 10 and round 9 analytical rails before inserting the round 11 deck to avoid stacked overlays
Keeps the real builder toolbar visible in focus canvas mode instead of hiding the core builder shell
Uses restrained glass surfaces and crisper edge contrast to reduce washout and glare on light content
Keeps preview decoration lightweight while builder-only panels remain out of preview mode
